name: Torta de Seitan and Veggies

ingredients.item: 15-ounce can black beans, drained and rinsed

method: Heat the oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add the onion and bell pepper and sauté for 10 to 15 minutes or until onion is translucent. Add the garlic, oregano, and cumin and cook for 1 minute. Tear the seiten into chunks and drop into the skillet. Add the black beans. Stir and cook over medium heat for 5 minutes or until seitan is heated through.
Cut each roll in half and scoop out some of the bread center. Spread a layer of salsa on the bread and sprinkle on some chopped romaine lettuce. Fill up with black bean and seitan mixture.
